---
title: 'Revaluation'
date: '2014-03-09T17:52:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1108757800674109864'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/revaluation.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Revelation'
---

I had a better day yesterday. What changed and what factors led to that change?<br />
Articles on Procrastinating by Personal Excellence. Specifically the self diagnosis piece.<br />
Study of Job. His key was to loose himself and focus on God.<br />
Entre' Leadership Podcast " Asking<br />
Ed's coaching bubbling back up. <br />
It's not about my agenda it's about them and their need. Meet them where they are. Lead them to the next step only.<br />
What are being paid to do?<br />
Mandy's kick in the pants holding me to a higher standard.
